NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMAN, VASUMATHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STANLEY DINTCHO DDS DBA UNION STREET DENTAL CARE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
